items.raw_excerpt: The younger brother of footy player and teacher Nathan Fitzgerald, who died last night, has described him as a "gentle, wonderful" soul who cherished his family.
items.summary_en: Nathan Fitzgerald, a footballer and teacher, died last night after a head injury during a game. His brother remembers him as a gentle, wonderful man who loved his family.
items.summary_ko: 선생님으로도 일한 풋볼 선수 네이선 피츠제럴드가 경기 중 머리 부상으로 어젯밤 세상을 떠났다. 그의 동생은 그를 가족을 사랑한 상냥하고 멋진 사람이라고 기억했다.
items.title_en: Tributes pour in for footy player Nathan Fitzgerald who died from head injury
items.title_ko: 경기 중 머리 부상으로 숨진 풋볼 선수 네이선 피츠제럴드, 추모 물결
items.title_original: Tributes flow for Nathan Fitzgerald following game day head injury

items.raw_excerpt: Hyderabad Traffic Police mandates breathalyser tests for school bus drivers to enhance student safety amid rising DUI incidents.
items.summary_en: Hyderabad Traffic Police ordered school managements to conduct mandatory breathalyser tests for bus drivers. The rule aims to protect students after a rise in drunk-driving incidents. Drivers who fail will be replaced immediately.
items.summary_ko: 하이데라바드 교통경찰이 학교에 통학버스 기사 대상 음주 측정을 의무화하도록 지시했다. 음주 운전 증가에 따라 학생 안전을 강화하기 위한 조치다. 측정에 실패한 기사는 즉시 교체된다.
items.title_en: Hyderabad mandates breathalyser tests for school bus drivers
items.title_ko: 하이데라바드, 통학버스 기사 음주 측정 의무화
items.title_original: Introduce mandatory breathalyser tests for school transport drivers: Hyderabad Traffic Police to managements

items.raw_excerpt: A Brisbane mother says police can improve the way they respond to harassment complaints after she was followed by a car during her morning run.
items.summary_en: A Brisbane mother was followed by a car during her morning run. She wants police to handle harassment complaints better. The woman felt scared and unsure about reporting it.
items.summary_ko: 브리즈번의 한 어머니가 아침 조깅 중 차량에 쫓기는 괴롭힘을 당했다. 그녀는 경찰이 괴롭힘 신고 대응 방식을 개선해야 한다고 말한다. 이 여성은 두려움과 신고에 대한 망설임을 느꼈다.
items.title_en: Brisbane runner hesitant to report harassment ordeal
items.title_original: Brisbane runner 'hesitant' to report harassment ordeal

items.raw_excerpt: NSW Police say an officer filmed repeatedly punching a man in the back of the head on in Western Sydney on Monday night was using an "approved manoeuvre".
items.summary_en: A NSW Police officer was filmed repeatedly punching a man in the back of the head in Western Sydney on Monday night. Police say the officer was using an 'approved manoeuvre' during the arrest. The video has sparked public debate about police use of force.
items.summary_ko: NSW 경찰이 월요일 밤 서부 시드니에서 한 남성의 뒷머리를 주먹으로 여러 차례 가격하는 모습이 영상에 포착됐다. 경찰은 해당 경찰관이 체포 과정에서 '승인된 기술'을 사용했다고 밝혔다. 이 영상은 경찰의 진압 기술에 대한 대중의 논란을 불러일으켰다.
items.title_en: Officer filmed punching man was using 'approved manoeuvre', police say
items.title_ko: 경찰, 남성 머리 폭행 영상에 "승인된 기술"이었다고 해명
items.title_original: Officer filmed punching man was using 'approved manoeuvre', police say

items.raw_excerpt: Food safety inspections reveal hygiene violations at four Cyberabad restaurants, including unlabelled food and sanitation issues.
items.summary_en: Food safety officials found hygiene violations at four restaurants in Cyberabad. The problems included unlabelled food and poor sanitation. Inspectors took action after recent food safety concerns.
items.summary_ko: 사이버라바드 음식점 4곳이 식품 안전 점검에서 위생 위반으로 적발됐습니다. 표시 없는 식재료와 위생 상태 불량이 문제가 됐습니다. 당국은 최근 식품 안전 우려와 관련해 점검을 진행했습니다.
items.title_en: Hygiene violations found at four Cyberabad restaurants
items.title_ko: 사이버라바드 음식점 4곳 위생 점검서 위반 사항 적발
items.title_original: Sanitation lapses found during food safety inspections at four Cyberabad restaurants
